channel.title: Shane Curry
channel.description: Updates, blog posts, and durable technical pages by Shane Curry.

item.title: The Vagueness Was Protective
item.description: A working note about how impossibility allowed a creative vision to remain emotionally comforting and undefined until AI removed the technical barrier.

item.title: Emotional Scope Creep
item.description: A working note about a utility project that grew because the characters inside it kept demanding more emotional and structural attention.

item.title: AI Ended the Loneliness of Making
item.description: A working note about how conversational collaboration with Claude reduced the emotional isolation of solo development work.

item.title: Duration Is a Proxy for Worth
item.description: A working note about the habit of valuing output through time spent and how AI puts pressure on that measurement.

item.title: None of Us Have Parents
item.description: A working note about the current AI moment as a collective sketchbook phase with no stable mentor class above it.

item.title: Initial site scaffold and blog index
item.description: Initial publication scaffold for Shane Curry's canonical source site, including the blog index, identity page, topic hub, notes method, and machine-readable support files.
